channel.title: Company on Yakkl.com
channel.description: Recent content in Company on Yakkl.com

item.title: Join our Slack community
item.description: I know, right? Why do we have a Slack channel? Simple, Slack is a good tool but for large diverse teams it gets a little challenging to administer not to mention “Channel Sprawl”. We have a Slack channel in the unlikely event Yakkl is having an issue and you may want to instant message us. Again, not likely. Want to chat with the Yakkl community about best-practices, features, and more? Join the slack community here (we’ll get back to you ASAP).
